opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Liberty Air has no online booking, no booking tools, and is phone-only contact.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors with instant scheduling.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget so Liberty Air captures leads 24/7 without phone calls.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise homeowners vanishes with zero follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording and CRM capture to log every lead and trigger automatic follow-up.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on Liberty Air's site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's harsh winters and hot summers make seasonal tune-ups a recurring revenue goldmine untapped.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminders via AI to convert past customers into recurring service contracts.
